# PersonStanding

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="PersonStanding icon">

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::PersonStanding;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        PersonStanding { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
people, human, accessibility, stick figure

## Categories
accessibility, people
